-o, --output <file>         Write to file instead of stdout

commands.name: tshark
commands.description: Capturer et analyser le trafic réseau
details: -H <hosts file>          read a list of entries from a hosts file, which will
-f <capture filter>      packet filter in libpcap filter syntax

commands.name: ffuf
commands.description: ffuf est un outil de fuzzing web léger écrit en Go qui permet la découverte classique de répertoires, la découverte d'hôtes virtuels (sans enregistrements DNS) et le fuzzing des paramètres GET et POST.
details: -H                  Header `"Name: Value"`, separated by colon. Multiple -H flags are accepted.
examples: Fuzzing POST username        → ffuf -w /usr/share/wordlists/SecLists/Usernames/Names/names.txt -X POST -d 'username=FUZZ&password=x' -H 'Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded' -u http://<ip>/login -mr 'username already exists'
Fuzzing de sous-domaines     → ffuf -w /usr/share/wordlists/SecLists/Discovery/DNS/subdomains-top1million-5000.txt -H 'Host: FUZZ.<domain>' -u http://<ip>
Filtrer par code HTTP        → ffuf -w wordlist.txt -u http://<ip>/FUZZ -mc 200,301
